Checkbox

Source: Figma Input Checkbox (2352:2179). Bare 14×14 (Base) or 12×12 (Small) box, radius S (4px). 10 states. Plus checkbox-with-label rows, horizontal/vertical groups, and a full field with Label / (Optional) / help / Hint.

Bare checkbox states (Base 14×14)
State
Default
Hover
Default
Checked
Indeterminate
Disabled (unchecked)
Disabled (checked)
Error
Error (checked)
Success
Success (checked)
Sizes
Base · 14
Small · 12
Checkbox + Label (Input_Checkbox_Core)
Placeholder
Groups (Input_CheckBox_Combo)
Horizontal · 4 items
Vertical · 3 items
Full field (CheckBox_Base ✦)
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)

Hint Text
